title: SymbolicAssessment
description: MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1 §8 — Common symbolic assessment block appended to every major tool output. This schema is intended to be referenced via $ref (not inlined) from each organ's per-tool output schema. Additive only — never rewires existing fields. spec: /root/arifOS/forge_work/MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1.md

literal_result.description: Plain, factual statement of what this tool actually did or returned. No interpretation.

symbolic_meaning.description: How this output will likely be read socially — by Arif, by institutions, by downstream agents. Distinguish from literal.

authority_used.description: Which authority was the basis for this action (e.g. arifOS, VAULT999, Arif, institution, none).

authority_missing.description: Which authority was NOT present but was implicitly required. Empty string if none.

social_blast_radius.description: Estimated social blast radius of this output if leaked or misread.

cultural_risk.description: Cultural-sensitivity risk class. Empty/None if no cultural dimension is implicated.

reversibility.description: Whether the social/operational effect of this output can be undone.

next_safe_action.description: Suggested next action that preserves reversibility and avoids false-seal/maruah risk.

evidence_layer.description: Optional. Which evidence layer this output rests on (L0=raw, L1=derived, L2=interpreted, L3=speculative).

false_seal_risk.description: Optional. Risk that this output will be misread as a constitutional SEAL when it is not.
